name: Wiki Context Injector
description: Injects relevant wiki pages into every prompt via before_prompt_build. Requires wiki_context.py from ai-longterm-wiki-memory.

workspace.description: Percorso assoluto alla wiki workspace (directory contenente wiki.config.json). Opzionale: default = directory padre del plugin (wiki/).

wikiContextScript.description: Percorso assoluto a wiki_context.py. Opzionale: default = <plugin-root>/../../scripts/wiki_context.py (wiki/scripts/wiki_context.py).

pythonExecutable.description: Python executable. On Windows Store Python use the absolute path (e.g. C:\Users\...\python.exe).

k.description: Number of wiki pages to inject per prompt

maxChars.description: Max characters per wiki chunk included in the context block

debug.description: Write diagnostic log to <workspace>/.wiki-plugin-debug.log on every prompt
